item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: alan@ceosnm.com
item.content:encoded:
Technology That Moves Us Forward

BULL GPS TRAKING products provide real-time data, analytics, and insights about your most valuable assets.

Discover Products

Why BULL GPS TRAKING?

  • Our products were born from decades of experience within the transportation industry.
  • With our predictive technology, identify small issues before they become big problems.
  • Our products are easy-to-install and can be activated by a mobile device within minutes.
  • Our integrated hubs are compatible with most sensors from leading manufacturers.
  • Our systems help reduce fuel costs, improve driver retention, and increase ROI.

FEATURED PRODUCT

Smart7TM

Our flagship device. One system, endless possibilities. Monitor trailer location, status, and health anytime, anywhere with our most robust product. This integrated gateway mounted to the nose box offers a cellular gateway to track all your sensors through one hub.

Total awareness of your trailer.

Integrated cellular gateway maintains continuous 4G-LTE connection to the trailer. Simple to customize with the sensors that best fit your business.

Information instantaneously delivered to the cloud.

Integrated fleet tracking and management

COMPREHENSIVE TRACKING

  • Remote Pre-Check
  • Continuous reporting
  • GPS location and tracking

Powerful Connect1 Platform

1 GATEWAY. 1 REAL-TIME FLEET DASHBOARD. 1 DRIVER-ALERT SYSTEM. 1 SUBSCRIPTION. 1 INVOICE. JUST 1 SYSTEM FOR YOUR ENTIRE FLEET.

APPLICATION

A Solution for Every Asset

Trailers

Gain total awareness into your trailer with data, insights and analysis of trailer health in real-time.

Chassis

Comprehensive monitoring of chassis sensors. Receive status updates and notifications about issues before they happen.

Container

Monitor location and status of containers and cargo with real-time alerts from a single hub.

Other

Monitor the location and status of small vehicles and heavy equipment with our high-performance tracking systems.

THE BULL GPS TRAKING SUITE

Our Products

A complete line of intelligent products to monitor your most valuable assets.

Smart7TM Nosebox

See product

SolarNetTM

See product

StealthNetTM

See product

EZTrac (Multiple options)

See product

AssetTracTM

See product

EZTrac on ABS Harness

See product

EZTrac HWTM

See product

{"timeout":1776766221,"value":{"content":"

Technology That Moves Us Forward

[elementor-element k="cc9fd83510550924ec398c2639794c91" data=""]
Discover Products

Why BULL GPS TRAKING?

  • Our products were born from decades of experience within the transportation industry.
  • With our predictive technology, identify small issues before they become big problems.
  • Our products are easy-to-install and can be activated by a mobile device within minutes.
  • Our integrated hubs are compatible with most sensors from leading manufacturers.
  • Our systems help reduce fuel costs, improve driver retention, and increase ROI.

FEATURED PRODUCT

Smart7TM

[elementor-element k="cc9fd83510550924ec398c2639794c91" data=""]

Total awareness of your trailer.

[elementor-element k="cc9fd83510550924ec398c2639794c91" data=""]

Integrated fleet tracking and management

[elementor-element k="cc9fd83510550924ec398c2639794c91" data=""]
  • Remote Pre-Check
  • Continuous reporting
  • GPS location and tracking

Powerful Connect1 Platform

[elementor-element k="cc9fd83510550924ec398c2639794c91" data=""]

APPLICATION

A Solution for Every Asset

Trailers

Gain total awareness into your trailer with data, insights and analysis of trailer health in real-time.

Chassis

Comprehensive monitoring of chassis sensors. Receive status updates and notifications about issues before they happen.

Container

Monitor location and status of containers and cargo with real-time alerts from a single hub.

Other

Monitor the location and status of small vehicles and heavy equipment with our high-performance tracking systems.

THE BULL GPS TRAKING SUITE

Our Products

item.title: Products
item.dc:creator: alan@ceosnm.com
item.content:encoded:
IoT: Internet of Trailers™

The IoT: Internet of Trailers™ describes trailers with Bull gps tracking sensors, gateways, cameras, and other technologies that connect and exchange data through various communication mediums such as BLE, cellular, and CAN to the Connect1™ software to make data actionable for fleets.

Smart7TM Nosebox

See product

SolarNetTM

See product

StealthNetTM

See product

EZTrac (Multiple options)

See product

AssetTracTM

See product

EZTrac on ABS Harness

See product

EZTrac HWTM

See product

Sensors

Bull gps tracking product suite features an array of sensors that collect and turn billions of data points into actionable information for fleet owners, identifying trends to help fleets avoid costly problems, maximize efficiency, reduce downtime, and increase your ROI.

Harnesses

Bull gps tracking is the leading manufacturer of harnesses in North America, backed by nearly 100 years of experience. Designed for ease of use and easy maintenance, Bull gps tracking harnesses are guaranteed to keep your system corrosion-free. As a product of Bull gps tracking longstanding history of superior quality, Bull gps tracking harnesses connect and seamlessly supply power to your trailer and nose box.

Connect1™

Never lose sight of your most valuable assets again. The Connect1™ user interface provides fleet owners with infinitely actionable data for a real-time look into the health of your trailer.

item.title: EZTrac
item.dc:creator: alan@ceosnm.com
item.content:encoded:
REAL-TIME, HIGH-PERFORMANCE ASSET TRACKING.

EZTrac™

Covert tracking device that’s easy to install and monitor. immersive visibility into health, safety, and efficiency. Reliable and durable chassis, dolly, and trailer tracking with integrated GPS. ABS required. Contact sales to learn more and purchase.

Contact Sales

Insight into your most valuable assets.

HARDWARE

  • Plug-and-play design. Durable and waterproof GPS device that plugs into the industry standard ABS harness that’s easily installed with no tools.

TRACKING

  • Wireless 4G-LTE modem for nationwide access to custom reports on health, status, and location.

PLATFORM

One web portal delivers complete transparency and asset management on any device anytime.

Compare Products

Find the right Bull gps tracking device for any asset and any fleet size.

KEY DIFFERENCES

SOLARNET

STEALTHNET

INSTALLATION LOCATION

Nose/Door

Multiple

REPORTING FREQUENCY (MOVING)

Variable

5 minutes

REPORTING FREQUENCY (STOPPED)

11.5 Hours

ABS

PRICE

$$

$$

AVERAGE ROI

Better

Better

Competitive Edge

  • Real-time, high-performance asset tracking.
  • Fully installed in under 5 minutes.
  • IP67 end-to-end.

THE PLATFORM

Real-time Analysis in a Dashboard

Technology designed to integrate with your most valuable assets.

All Products

item.title: Smart7
item.dc:creator: alan@ceosnm.com
item.content:encoded:
ALL-IN-ONE DEVICE

Smart7™

Our flagship device. One system, endless possibilities. Monitor trailer location, status, and health anytime, anywhere with our most robust product. This integrated gateway mounted to the nose box offers a cellular gateway to track all your sensors through one hub. Contact sales to learn more and purchase.

Contact Sales

HARDWARE

  • Integrated cellular gateway maintains continuous 4G-LTE connection to the trailer.
  • Requires absolutely no additional harnessing or electrical connections.
  • Information instantaneously delivered to the cloud.

TRACKING & FEATURES

  • Continuous monitoring powered by on-board battery
  • Continuous reporting
  • GPS location and tracking
  • Light-out detection
  • PLC reader to monitor ABS fault codes
  • On-demand trailer pre-check

PLATFORM

Delivering real-time data to the Bull gps tracking platform for complete transparency and asset management.

Compare Products

Find the right Bull gps tracking device for any asset and any fleet size.

KEY DIFFERENCES

SMART7

SOLARNET

STEALTHNET

BASIC INSTALLATION TIME

30 Minutes

Variable

Variable

INSTALLATION LOCATION

Nose

Nose/Door

Multiple

PRIMARY POWER SOURCE

ABS

Solar/Tethered

ABS

REPORTING FREQUENCY (MOVING)

5 Minutes

Variable

5 Minutes

REPORTING FREQUENCY (STOPPED)

11.5 Hours

11.5 Hours

11.5 Hours

PRICE

$$$

$$

$$

AVERAGE ROI

Best

Better

Better

Competitive Edge

  • All-in-one, complete asset monitoring solution.
  • Three power sources to keep the battery charged.
  • You can easily add on sensors.
  • The only nosebox installation option in the industry.
  • Light-out detection and pre-check come standard.
  • Add the IntelliSense™ Harness for future compatibility.

THE PLATFORM

Real-time Analysis in a Dashboard

Technology designed to integrate with your most valuable assets.

See product

ALL-IN-ONE DEVICE

Smart7™

[elementor-element k="cc9fd83510550924ec398c2639794c91" data=""]
Contact Sales

HARDWARE

  • Integrated cellular gateway maintains continuous 4G-LTE connection to the trailer.
  • Requires absolutely no additional harnessing or electrical connections.
  • Information instantaneously delivered to the cloud.

TRACKING & FEATURES

  • Continuous monitoring powered by on-board battery
  • Continuous reporting
  • GPS location and tracking
  • Light-out detection
  • PLC reader to monitor ABS fault codes
  • On-demand trailer pre-check

Competitive Edge

  • All-in-one, complete asset monitoring solution.
  • Three power sources to keep the battery charged.
  • You can easily add on sensors.
  • The only nosebox installation option in the industry.
  • Light-out detection and pre-check come standard.
  • Add the IntelliSense™ Harness for future compatibility.

THE PLATFORM

Real-time Analysis in a Dashboard

item.title: RFID
item.dc:creator: alan@ceosnm.com
item.content:encoded:
RFID READER (DRIVER IDENTIFICATION)

Contact Sales
Dimensions 95 × 60 × 12mm 3.74” (L) × 2.36”(W) × 0.47”(H)
Weight 78g (2.75oz
Operating Voltage 7V~32V DC
Standby Current < 6 mA @12V
Operating Temperature -20º ~+80º
Storage Temperature -20º ~+85º
Frequency 13.56 MHz| 125KHz
Supported RF Standards and Transponders MIFARE: MIFARE Mini, MIFARE Ultralight, MIFARE DESFire EV1, MIFARE Plus, MIFARE ONE (S50), MIFARE ONE (S70), MIFARE Pro (X) LEGIC: LEGIC 4K capacity Card, LEGIC 2K capacity Card, LEGIC multi-protocol Card, LEGIC Credit Card ELID: ELID Proximity Card
Standards Comply with ISO1443A standard and ELID proximity
Interfaces 1-Wire interface The LED lights in red indicates power on
LED Indicator The LED flashes in blue three times indicates successful data transmission
Buzzer Triggers when power on and successful identification

item.title: StealthNet
item.dc:creator: alan@ceosnm.com
item.content:encoded:
HIGH-PERFORMANCE TRACKING WITH A LONGER BATTERY LIFE.

StealthNet™

Hidden installation with double battery capacity. Integrates with virtually any sensor for reliable, actionable insights. Keep tabs on asset health, location, and efficiency. Instantly access important data in real-time. Contact sales to learn more and purchase.

Contact Sales

HARDWARE

Sturdy, waterproof unit built to withstand life on the road. Installs in 10 minutes with multiple mounting options. Works with or without power, and provides six-month battery back-up.

TRACKING

Access to live tracking and custom reports on health, status, and location via a wireless modem.

PLATFORM

One web portal delivers complete transparency and asset management on any device anytime.

Compare Products

Find the right Bull gps tracking device for any asset and any fleet size.

KEY DIFFERENCES

STEALTHNET

SOLARNET

SMART7

BASIC INSTALLATION TIME

Variable

Variable

30 Minutes

INSTALLATION LOCATION

Multiple

Nose/Door

Nose

PRICE

$$

$$

$$$

AVERAGE ROI

Better

Better

Best

Competitive Edge

  • Real-time, high-performance asset tracking.
  • Charges twice as fast.
  • IP67 end-to-end.
  • Multiple installation location options.
  • One hub, total access and insight.
  • Double the battery capacity.
  • Covert installation.
  • Easy to add on sensors.

THE PLATFORM

Real-time Analysis in a Dashboard

Technology designed to integrate with your most valuable assets.

All Products

Smart7TM Nosebox

See product

SolarNetTM

See product

Competitive Edge

  • Real-time, high-performance asset tracking.
  • Charges twice as fast.
  • IP67 end-to-end.
  • Multiple installation location options.
  • One hub, total access and insight.
  • Double the battery capacity.
  • Covert installation.
  • Easy to add on sensors.

THE PLATFORM

item.title: AssetTrac
item.dc:creator: alan@ceosnm.com
item.content:encoded:
VERSATILE TRACKING DEVICE

AssetTrac™

Our high-performance peel and stick tracking device built to go anywhere your assets do. Monitor any powered or non-powered asset in your fleet from a single platform. Contact sales to learn more and purchase.

Contact Sales

HARDWARE

  • Quick and easy to install — slap and track within minutes. GPS unit is designed to be placed anywhere it’s needed.

TRACKING

  • Access to live tracking and custom reports on status and location.

PLATFORM

  • One web portal delivers complete transparency and asset management on any device anytime.

Compare Products

Find the right Bull gps tracking device for any asset and any fleet size.

KEY DIFFERENCES

ASSETTRAC

EZTRAC HW

EZTRAC PS

BASIC INSTALLATION TIME

5 Minutes

5 Minutes

5 Minutes

INSTALLATION LOCATION

Anywhere

7 Way

Vehicle Battery

PRICE

$

$

$

AVERAGE ROI

Good

Good

Good

Competitive Edge

  • Flexible, high-performance asset monitoring.
  • Customizable messaging frequency.
  • Can record 4,000 events.
  • Super easy to install on any asset imaginable.

THE PLATFORM

Real-time Analysis in a Dashboard

Technology designed to integrate with your most valuable assets.

All Products

Smart7TM Nosebox

See product

SolarNetTM

See product

StealthNetTM

See product

EZTrac (Multiple options)

See product

EZTrac on ABS Harness

See product

EZTrac HWTM

See product

item.title: EZTrac HE ™
item.dc:creator: alan@ceosnm.com
item.content:encoded:
HIGH PERFORMANCE TRACKING, WITH CONSISTENT POWER.

EZTrac HE ™

Functional and flexible visibility into a fleet’s health and efficiency. A scalable heavy-equipment solution designed to fit any powered or unpowered asset. This includes tractors/excavators, construction equipment, trailers, chassis, and powersports.

Contact Sales

HARDWARE

  • Waterproof
  • Withstands harsh temperatures
  • Installs in less than 5 minutes
  • 4GE compatible

TRACKING & FEATURES

  • GPS and geofencing
  • Locate equipment in an instant
  • Optimize equipment utilization
  • Analyze battery voltage and performance

PLATFORM

One web portal delivers complete transparency and asset management on any device anytime.

Compare Products

Find the right Bull gps tracking device for any asset and any fleet size.

KEY DIFFERENCES

EZTRAC HE

ASSETTRAC

EZTRAC PS

BASIC INSTALLATION TIME

5 Minutes

5 Minutes

5 Minutes

INSTALLATION LOCATION

7 Way

Anywhere

Vehicle Battery

PRICE

$

$

$

AVERAGE ROI

Good

Good

Good

Competitive Edge

  • Made for the toughest conditions
  • Receive automated alerts on any asset
  • Real-time visibility geofencing

THE PLATFORM

Real-time Analysis in a Dashboard

Technology designed to integrate with your most valuable assets.

All Products

Smart7TM Nosebox

See product

SolarNetTM

See product

StealthNetTM

See product

EZTrac (Multiple options)

See product

AssetTracTM

See product

EZTrac on ABS Harness

See product

EZTrac HWTM

See product

item.title: EZTrac HW ™
item.dc:creator: alan@ceosnm.com
item.content:encoded:
REAL-TIME, HIGH-PERFORMANCE ASSET TRACKING.

EZTrac™

Covert tracking device that’s easy to install and monitor. immersive visibility into health, safety, and efficiency. Reliable and durable chassis, dolly, and trailer tracking with integrated GPS. ABS required. Contact sales to learn more and purchase.

Contact Sales

HARDWARE

Plug-and-play design. Durable and waterproof GPS device that plugs into the industry standard ABS harness that’s easily installed with no tools.

TRACKING

Wireless 4G-LTE modem for nationwide access to custom reports on health, status, and location.

PLATFORM

One web portal delivers complete transparency and asset management on any device anytime.

Compare Products

Find the right Bull gps tracking device for any asset and any fleet size.

KEY DIFFERENCES

SOLARNET

SOLARNET

INSTALLATION LOCATION

Nose/Door

Multiple

REPORTING FREQUENCY (MOVING)

Variable

5 Minutes

REPORTING FREQUENCY (STOPPED)

11.5 Hours

11.5 Hours

PRICE

$$

$$

AVERAGE ROI

Better

Better

Competitive Edge

  • Real-time, high-performance asset tracking.
  • Fully installed in under 5 minutes.
  • IP67 end-to-end.

THE PLATFORM

Real-time Analysis in a Dashboard

Technology designed to integrate with your most valuable assets.

All Products

Smart7TM Nosebox

See product

SolarNetTM

See product

StealthNetTM

See product

EZTrac (Multiple options)

See product

See product

See product

item.title: SolarNet™
item.dc:creator: alan@ceosnm.com
item.content:encoded:
DUAL-POWERED, HIGH-PERFORMANCE TRACKING.

SolarNet™

Twice the battery capacity as competitive devices. Functional and flexible visibility into a fleet’s health and efficiency on-demand. Reliable and durable support with an integrated solar-powered 4G-LTE cellular tracking system. Mount on a container, railcar, trailer, or heavy equipment. Contact sales to learn more and purchase.

Contact Sales

HARDWARE

Solar-powered GPS device that’s easily installed with dual mounting options.

TRACKING

Access to live tracking and custom reports on status and location.

PLATFORM

One web portal delivers complete transparency and asset management on any device anytime.

Compare Products

Find the right Bull gps tracking device for any asset and any fleet size.

KEY DIFFERENCES

SOLARNET

STEALTHNET

SMART7

BASIC INSTALLATION TIME

Variable

Variable

30 Minutes

INSTALLATION LOCATION

Nose/Door

Multiple

Nose

PRICE

$$

$$

$$$

AVERAGE ROI

Better

Better

Best

Competitive Edge

  • One hub, total access and insight.
  • Installs in 15 minutes.
  • Easy to add on sensors.
  • Real-time, high-performance asset monitoring.
  • IP67 end-to-end.

THE PLATFORM

Real-time Analysis in a Dashboard

Technology designed to integrate with your most valuable assets.

All Products

Smart7TM Nosebox

See product

StealthNetTM

See product

EZTrac (Multiple options)

See product

AssetTracTM

See product

EZTrac on ABS Harness

See product

EZTrac HWTM
